headline: Local Family Opens New PostalAnnex Location in Clovis, California
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., one of the leading franchisors in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is proud to announce the opening of its newest PostalAnnex location in Clovis, CA to new owners, Guriqbal and Manpreet Cheema. This new PostalAnnex is set to offer a wide range of essential shipping, mailbox rental and office services to the local community.
